name: Enfeebling Abyssal Mating
outcome: [AttackerName] lovingly makes out with [TargetName], rolling her tongue around [TargetHisOrHer] mouth while the void around them languorously swirls with dark magic.|n|[AttackerName]'s myriad of possessive hands gently caressing [TargetHimOrHer] all over, tracing tingly circles and symbols with their nails, a feeling of mind-spinning enervation slowly creeping into [TargetName] every time she swings her waist and [TargetHisOrHer] tip strikes her womb.
miss: [AttackerName] lovingly makes out with [TargetName], rolling her tongue around [TargetHisOrHer] mouth while the void around them languorously swirls with dark magic, [AttackerName]'s myriad of possessive hands gently caressing [TargetHimOrHer] all over... but [TargetName] manages to ignore both the tempting massage and enfeebling hex!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] groans into [AttackerName]'s mouth as a flare of fell light washes over them, [TargetHisOrHer] body feeling irresistibly slack and weak as [TargetHeOrShe] falls under the power of a strength-sapping curse!
